TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Kingdalruwane, title = Kingdalruwane, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kingdalruwane} }

S.FORM: Kingdalruwane i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Kingdalruwane. u kasalumaluma' nu Kingdalruwane sa, 17 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 62 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 61 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 1 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Rukai 66%, Paiwan 21%, zumazuma 11%.
S.PHON: kiŋdar~ɾruwanə i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu kiŋdar~ɾruwanə. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu kiŋdar~ɾruwanə sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, ** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, *ukai **%, paiwan **%, zumazuma **%.
S.FORM: Kingdalruwane i Pingtung a kuwan nu Kalinku ku niyazu' nu Kingdalruwane. u kasalumaluma' nu Kingdalruwane sa, 17 ku luma'. kumud nu kasabinawlan sa, 62 ku tademawan. kasabinawlan nu Ingcumin sa, 61 ku tademaw, pakalatu 98%. u zuma sa, cay ku Ingcumin, 1 ku tademaw, pakalatu 2%. u kasabinacadan, Rukai 66%, Paiwan 21%, zumazuma 11%.
S.PHON: kiŋdar~ɾruwanə i piŋtuŋ a kuwan nu kar~ɾinku ku nijazuʔ~ʡ nu kiŋdar~ɾruwanə. u kasar~ɾumar~ɾumaʔ~ʡ nu kiŋdar~ɾruwanə sa, ** ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ. kumud nu kasabinawr~ɾan sa, ** ku tadəmawan. kasabinawr~ɾan nu iŋʦumin sa, ** ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu **%. u zuma sa, ʦaj ku iŋʦumin, * ku tadəmaw, pakar~ɾatu *%. u kasabinaʦadan, *ukai **%, paiwan **%, zumazuma **%.
